daemon_reload_plan_bridge.purpose: Plan daemon-reload only after target service/timer file post-audit is clean.

apply_plan_contract.future_real_approval_phrase: PHASE26L backpressure refresh runner service timer apply real için onay veriyorum
future_real_steps: copy accepted temp service to target service
copy accepted temp timer to target timer
verify target hashes match accepted source hashes
daemon-reload only in approved real phase

approval_contract.approval_scope: write systemd service/timer files only, with backup and rollback; no service/timer start
approval_contract.required_phrase: PHASE26L backpressure refresh runner service timer apply real için onay veriyorum

denge_contract.MOTTO: Şimşek kadar hızlı, balyoz gibi vurucu, bir o kadar güvenli.

apply_plan_bridge.future_real_approval_phrase: PHASE26L backpressure refresh runner service timer apply real için onay veriyorum

temp_service_audit.excerpt:
[Unit]
Description=Coinoskobi Backpressure Refresh Runner DENGE dryrun service
Documentation=file:///root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/reports/LATEST_PHASE26I_BACKPRESSURE_REFRESH_RUNNER_SERVICE_TIMER_PLAN_NOAPI.md
ConditionPathExists=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/tools/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_runner_v1.py
ConditionPathExists=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/public/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_staging_v1/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_cache.json

[Service]
Type=oneshot
WorkingDirectory=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/tools/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_runner_v1.py --dryrun-once
TimeoutStartSec=20
Nice=5
NoNewPrivileges=true
PrivateTmp=true
ProtectHome=true
ProtectSystem=full
ReadWritePaths=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/public/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_staging_v1 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/runtime/backpressure_refresh_runner_v1 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/reports /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/data
Environment=COINOSKOBI_DENGE_MODE=1
Environment=COINOSKOBI_SAFE_OBSERVATION_ENTER_FAST=1
Environment=COINOSKOBI_NORMAL_EXIT_REQUIRES_CACHE_FRESH=1
Environment=COINOSKOBI_AUTO_AUTHORITY=0
Environment=COINOSKOBI_NO_WALLET_SIGN_TRADE_POLICY=1

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

temp_timer_audit.excerpt:
[Unit]
Description=Coinoskobi Backpressure Refresh Runner DENGE dryrun timer

[Timer]
OnBootSec=60s
OnUnitActiveSec=15s
AccuracySec=1s
Unit=coinoskobi-backpressure-refresh-runner.service
Persistent=false

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

post_audit_checks: target hashes match source temp units

rollback_rules: restore previous target service if existed
restore previous target timer if existed
remove target service if it did not exist before apply
remove target timer if it did not exist before apply
daemon-reload only in future real rollback if approval scope includes it

systemd_state_audit.note: No daemon-reload/start/enable was executed; systemctl calls are read-only state checks.
